canonical_definition: A multimodal benchmark designed to evaluate the associative ability of MLLMs by presenting multiple-choice visual association tasks where ambiguity has been systematically mitigated.
papers: Understanding the Modality Gap: An Empirical Study on the Speech-Text Alignment Mechanism of Large Speech Language Models

relationships.paper: Understanding the Modality Gap: An Empirical Study on the Speech-Text Alignment Mechanism of Large Speech Language Models
relationships.evidence: we construct the first multimodal associative benchmark circumventing ambiguity, AssoCiAm, to quantify models’ associative abilities. (Section 1)

emnlp25: Understanding the Modality Gap: An Empirical Study on the Speech-Text Alignment Mechanism of Large Speech Language Models
